ai_chat.query: Taking into consideration the documents given, write me a two paragraph impassioned plea to the city council to vote NO on agreeing to this deal. Reference some passages from a couple documents.

response.content: In the impassioned plea to the city council to reject Hallman Inc.'s proposal, it's crucial to highlight the long-term consequences and ethical considerations documented in the opposition materials. The Clean Bryn Bower Initiative (CBBI) pamphlet strongly argues that accepting the $19 million from Hallman would not only fail to address the full scope of contamination but would also inadvertently dismiss the profound moral responsibility of the polluter, which is Hallman Inc.

response.title: Clean Bryn Bower Initiative (CBBI) Opposition
response.description: The pamphlet distinctly opposes the proposal, emphasizing that Hallman should bear the complete financial burden for the cleanup, rather than passing costs to taxpayers. It warns of the implications for local flora and fauna and doubts the permanency of the proposed water safety promises if contamination spreads.

response.content: Furthermore, the leaked confidential Hallman document detailing cleanup costs presents alarming financial facts that demand attention. Accepting Hallman's offer could potentially leave the city financially liable for unprecedented future costs as the contamination problem worsens. The cleanup and efforts to contain the plume are projected to be immensely costly and technically challenging, raising significant concerns about the sufficiency of the proposed $19 million to manage the contamination effectively and sustainably.

response.title: Leaked Hallman Cleanup Cost Estimates
response.description: A leaked report estimates soaring costs for future cleanup efforts, far exceeding the offered settlement, with recommendations for extensive monitoring and containment that underscore the persistent and escalating nature of the pollution.

response.content: Insisting that the city council reject the Hallman proposal is not only about safeguarding financial resources but also about upholding justice for the residents and environmental integrity. It's imperative to consider the irreversible damage and ongoing risks highlighted in these documents to make a decision that truly serves the best interest of Bryn Bower and its citizens.
